chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 986 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of pre-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of pre-arrest bail 22.12.2025 Mr. Ali Hassan Abbasi, Advocate for applicants. Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate for complainant. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicants are present on interim pre-arrest bail. Today, I.O. is present and states that DNA sample was not obtained and though final medical report has been submitted, the victim has resiled from the allegations in his 164, Cr.P.C. statement. Learned Counsel for the applicants requires confirmation of the bail, whereas, learned Counsel for the complainant as well as learned DPG finds it difficult to oppose the same in view of the resiling statement of the victim. Accordingly, order dated 09.10.2025, whereby the applicants were granted interim pre-arrest bail, is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
